text: Editorial pass moved off OpenAI onto Claude (Sonnet) — runs on the same Anthropic key as the brief writer. It now checks formatting, sharpens every 'What to say' and 'Why it matters', enforces the Editorial Bible, flags weak/unsupported content, and detects broken source links. No more OpenAI dependency or extra bill.

Founder dashboard rebuilt — honest headline stats (subscribers, issues published, days live, editorial-QA status), an embedded live PostHog analytics view, a 'how we reach readers' explainer, and a refresh button.
Fixed the misleading 'Last post' card — it was pulling an unpublished Beehiiv draft dated Jan 1970. Beehiiv is now correctly shown as the subscriber list only (delivery is via Resend).
Connected the OpenAI editorial pass (OPENAI_API_KEY) in local + Vercel prod so the daily brief gets the Editorial-Bible enforcement pass.
Founder dashboard launched — live subscriber stats, changelog, and links to all analytics in one private page.
Added CAN-SPAM mailing address to brief emails, plus a /terms page and data-source attribution on Live + every brief.
"The Take" added to the brief — an Office Take + Bar Argument up top, with a jump-link in the section nav.
Live page now shows verified records & streaks (e.g. "youngest Monaco winner ever, 5 straight") and golf playoff detection — pulled from real data, never invented.
NBA + MLB games get a GuyTalk Read on Live: series state, records, top performer, pitching matchups — free from ESPN, no paid feed.
Fixed a bug that would have broken the next morning's auto-brief (markets section), plus a broken Culture layout.
F1 constructor identity badges on Live (brand colour + monogram) in place of plain dots.
Fixed the Live → Today's Brief 404 and mobile navigation across the site; added Archive search.
